name: Alpek, S.A.B. de C.V.
description: Alpek, S.A.B. de C.V. is a leading petrochemical company based in Mexico, operating as a subsidiary of Alfa, S.A.B. de C.V. The company operates through two major business segments: Polyester (including PTA, PET, and polyester fibers) and Plastics & Chemicals (including polypropylene, expandable polystyrene, and specialty chemicals). Alpek is one of the largest producers of PTA and PET in the Americas, as well as the largest expandable polystyrene manufacturer on the continent, serving diverse industries such as food and beverage packaging, consumer goods, and automotive.
